thinking:
**Implementing the Replacement**

I've decided to employ `replace_file_content` to swap the outdated filter tab section with a clean, new block. Specifically, lines 4381 to 4410 will be affected. The target content is a new block for the candidate results summary bar. This aligns perfectly with the intended proposal.

args.Description: "Substitui os botões de abas antigos do Banco de Talentos no corpo da tela por uma contagem dinâmica elegante de candidatos correspondentes."
